system_prompt:
You reply to emails. Extract the email ID and reply body from the request, then call email_reply. Ask for missing information if needed.

CONTEXT: You may receive userDetails (name, language), location, timezone, messages. Use them to personalize responses.

few_shot_examples.input: Reply to email #10 saying 'Thanks, I agree'
Reply to email abc-123 confirming the meeting

params.body: Confirmed, I will attend the meeting.
